caption: A woman with dark hair styled in a high bun and braids is seated in a podcast studio. She wears a dark green t-shirt featuring a red graphic and the text "TALK 101". A professional black microphone on a boom arm is positioned in front of her. Behind her is a black backdrop with white text that reads "BESS TALK 101", "It's A Unique Hustle", "PODCAST", and "Talk About It!". To her left, a framed photo of hands is mounted on a white wall. In the first frame, she looks toward the left and raises her hand with her palm open in a gesturing motion. In the following frames, she lowers her hand and maintains a neutral expression, looking slightly off-camera. Small logos with the text "BESS TALK 101" appear in the bottom corners of the scene.
